backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all core data types (appointments, clients, financial stats, dashboard) and serving as the backend canister for the scheduling/revenue app. Imports authorization mixins and access control modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing two related features: adding a 'Custom Range' period selection mode to RapportPDFPage.tsx and updating its data aggregation logic to filter appointments by arbitrary date ranges.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details, serving as a reference for the current state of the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Mon Agenda Revenus', mounting the app at the #root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that handles authentication state, profile setup modal, and TanStack Router configuration with routes for Dashboard, RapportPDFPage, and ClientDatabasePage.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentActio: Dialog component presenting edit (single or all future client appointments) and delete options for a selected appointment, delegating to AppointmentDialog and AppointmentDeleteDialog.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentDelet: Alert dialog component allowing the user to delete either a single appointment or all future appointments for the same client, with loading state and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentDialo: A dialog component for creating and editing appointments, with form fields for client info, scheduling, repetition type, and payment amount. Uses React Query hooks to add/update appointments and fetch client records.
Displays a tabbed list of appointments split into paid and unpaid, showing client details, date, time, and repetition info. Clicking an appointment opens an action dialog.
frontend/src/components/ClientPhotoField: A form field component for uploading and previewing a client photo, automatically cropping it to 35×45mm format. Handles file validation, image processing, and removal.
frontend/src/components/ComptaMoisCalend: A monthly calendar table view for accounting, displaying appointments in time-slot rows and day columns with inline editing for payment amounts and comments. Supports month navigation and appointment action dialogs.
frontend/src/components/FinancialOvervie: Displays three summary cards showing monthly revenue received, outstanding amounts due, and total appointment amounts for the current month.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: A sticky header with app branding, navigation links to dashboard, PDF report, and client database pages, a new appointment button, and a user dropdown menu with logout.
frontend/src/components/MonthlyListingTa: Renders a monthly client listing table with per-client rows showing appointment counts, revenues, credits, and balances, supporting manual January credit overrides via editable inputs.
frontend/src/components/MonthlySummarySe: Displays a yearly summary card table showing 'Revenus (Faits et Payés)' for each month of the given year, calculated from all appointments, with a total row at the top.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name and saves their profile via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation before proceeding.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for data fetching and mutations against the backend actor, covering user profiles, client records, appointments, and financial reports.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, and reusable typography component classes (e.g., frame-title, sum-total, table-header).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDatabasePage.ts: Full CRUD page for managing client records, including a form with photo upload, sortable table, CSV export, and delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying monthly and annual financial statistics, including revenue summaries, appointment counts, and credit data using memoized calculations.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login landing page showcasing app features with an Internet Identity login button.
frontend/src/pages/RapportPDFPage.tsx: Page for generating and downloading PDF reports (monthly, annual, or custom date range) by aggregating appointment data into monthly listing rows.
frontend/src/utils/bigintMath.ts: Utility functions for bigint arithmetic including abs, clamp, sum, min, and max to avoid Number precision loss.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utilities to convert an array of objects to a CSV string and trigger a browser download with proper UTF-8 BOM encoding.
frontend/src/utils/imageCrop.ts: Utilities to crop and resize an image file to a 35:45 passport-photo aspect ratio returning a Uint8Array, and to convert a stored Uint8Array photo to a blob URL for display.
frontend/src/utils/monthlyListing.ts: Provides pure utility functions for monthly revenue calculations (RDV faits, revenus, crédit positif/négatif) using a two-pass approach with bigint nanosecond timestamps, treating the calendar as the single source of truth.
frontend/src/utils/timeRange.ts: Utility functions for converting dates to bigint nanosecond timestamps and checking whether a timestamp falls within a given month range, avoiding Number precision loss.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them in sessionStorage, and removing sensitive parameters from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom design system with OKLCH color tokens, border radii, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state and feature roadmap, noting two implemented features for PDF report period selection (month/year) and a pending request to add a custom date-range selection mode reusing the existing table format.
